text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm walking to the training supply store, when...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh? Is that you, Hishiama?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Well, look who it is. Out shoppin' on your own
too, Grass?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Yes, I have an errand at the florist.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Huh. It isn't every day you go to the florist. I don't
even buy flowers for friends' birthdays.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh, this won't be a present. I'd like to buy some
flowers for my personal use.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hm? That's kinda cool.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I don't suppose you're planning to make pressed
flowers, seeing how you've bothered to make the
trip for 'em.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
While that is a lovely idea, I plan to use them for
a little flower arrangement.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Flower arrangement?! Geez, talk about being
fancy schmancy.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it's just a hobby of mine. It's especially
useful for when I want to calm my mind.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: ...I know! Would you like to join me, Hishiama?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Me? Arrange flowers?! You can't be serious.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
You'll never know unless you try, no? Come
along, now! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Maaaaan...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder begins an impromptu lesson about
each and every flower on display.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She looks very relaxed as she talks about the
flowers in great detail.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I've walked you through the basics, but you are
free to work with whatever colors or shapes you
please.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Like that's gonna help things... I don't mind
flowers, but I dunno much about 'em.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Go with what comes to you. Just leave it all to
feeling. ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I see flower arrangement as a mirror that reflects
the state of your mind.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
When your mind is turbulent, your flowers will
look wayward, no matter the placement.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
And when you're calm, they appear serene and
poised. The same flower can display different
emotions.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
As such, I consider this the perfect pastime for
moments of self-reflection.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Wait, are you saying you have something you
want to reflect on?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Well, not in particular. As I mentioned before, I
do this as a hobby.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
That's fine, but know I'm always around to lend an
ear if you've got somethin' on your mind. Don't be
shy now!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thank you very much.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I can breathe easy hearin' that. If there's anyone
who takes themselves too seriously, you'd be my
first pick.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I know you study and train even on your days off.
I was startin' to worry that you'd been overdoing
things.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: While I may be thorough, I would never go so far.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: At least, not now.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hm? Did you say somethin' just now?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Not at all. You shouldn't concern yourself over
me, honestly.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I've learned that cutting yourself some slack also
leads to growth. ♪
